use_ws_distance = .true.

num_iter         =  50000

dis_win_max  = 15.0
dis_froz_max = 1.0
dis_froz_min = -5.
dis_win_min  = -5.

dis_num_iter = 15000

iprint           =    2
num_dump_cycles  =   10
num_print_cycles =   10
guiding_centres = TRUE
!spinors = F

!! To plot the WFs

! restart                =  plot
! wannier_plot           =  true
! wannier_plot_supercell =  3
! wannier_plot_list      =  1,5
write_xyz = T
write_hr  = T
write_u_matrices = T
write_rmn = T

!! To plot the WF interpolated bandstructure
bands_plot      =  true
begin kpoint_path
Y  0   0.5   0  G  0   0   0  
G  0   0   0  X 0.5 0   0  
X  0.5 0   0  C  0.5   0.5   0  
C 0.5  0.5  0  L 0.5 0.5 0.5
L 0.5 0.5 0.5 G 0 0 0
end kpoint_path

bands_plot_format = gnuplot

  In:sp3
  As:sp3
End Projections
